Use your earnings to research new rides and expand your park. Scout mascots annually to boost popularity and unlock themed zones. Your goal is to reach Rank 1 in the national rankings by maximizing guest satisfaction and park popularity. Balance your budget, manage space wisely, and keep guests happy! No crashes or state inconsistencies should occur during 500 frames of gameplay. Win condition test. Implements an optimal strategy to reach Rank 1 by maximizing income generation, strategic attraction placement, efficient research progression, and mascot recruitment to boost popularity. Focus on maximizing guest satisfaction and income to climb rankings quickly. The game should reach GAME_OVER_WIN state (Rank 1 achieved) within a reasonable timeframe. ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story)

Welcome to ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story)! Build and expand your dream amusement park on a grid. Place attractions to attract guests who generate income and satisfaction. Use your earnings to research new rides and expand your park. Scout mascots annually to boost popularity and unlock themed zones. Your goal is to reach Rank 1 in the national rankings by maximizing guest satisfaction and park popularity. Balance your budget, manage space wisely, and keep guests happy!

Arrow Keys: Navigate menu/grid selection | Space: Confirm selection (place attraction, research, expand) | Shift: Toggle between Build/Research/Expand modes | Z: Cancel current action or go back
